scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,ui -c blue,green "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter ui dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @zerohand/db build && pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter ui build && pnpm --filter @i75corridor/zh-cli build
scripts.db:reset: rm -rf .data/postgres && echo 'Database reset. Run pnpm dev to re-initialize.'
scripts.reset: rm -rf .data && echo 'Full reset complete. Run pnpm dev to re-initialize.'
